---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## User Story
As a [type of user],
I want [function],
so that [business value].

## Description
Explain the requirement, screen, API, data field, or workflow.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Given [condition], when [action], then [expected result]
- [ ] Error handling is completed
- [ ] Logging is available
- [ ] Tested in SIT/UAT

## Technical Notes
API / database / integration / security notes.

## Dependencies
Example: Waiting for WMS API document or business field mapping.
